patterns.name: Ascending Triangle
patterns.note: Flat resistance with rising lows; bullish breakout bias.

patterns.name: Double Top
patterns.note: Two near-equal peaks; breaks down below the trough (neckline).

earnings_basis_divergence.interpretation: Standalone (unconsolidated) EPS for 2025 is 91% BELOW the consolidated figure — subsidiaries/associates are contributing earnings the parent-only accounts don't show; the group is worth more than the standalone.
